summary: Bed bug treatment app with home page navigation

existing_features.title: Create a new home page component that serves as the landing page for the application with a welcoming introduction to the bed bug educational app

Add navigation icons on the home page representing each main section of the app (scanner, identify, habitats, prevention, treatment, guides, find local help) with clear visual indicators of where to start
Implement smooth scroll behavior when clicking navigation icons on the home page to scroll to the corresponding section
Add a persistent home button icon in the header or navigation that allows users to return to the home page from any section

new_feature_requests.summary: Add home page with navigation icons and home button
